content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

The changes are correct and well-tested. Key additions: (1) `prompt_bead_status`/`prompt_bead_outcome` helpers that return 'unknown' for missing summaries instead of None, ensuring prompts always show status info; (2) `infer_implicit_slot_hint` fallback for finding bead position when title-based matching fails; (3) constraint deduplication fix removing the redundant Constraints rendering from milestone_summary (verified by count==1 test assertion); (4) comprehensive test coverage including `br list` failure resilience, implicit slot hint fallback, and planned-elsewhere rendering for title-drifted beads. All 748 tests pass. No new clippy warnings (actually fixed one pre-existing). The `infer_implicit_slot_hint` indices are safe since they come from enumerating the same immutable bundle reference used at the access site. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
